## Problem

What gap or pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want to see.

## Why this belongs here

Explain how this improves the public blueprint rather than a one-off project.

## Alternatives considered

List any other approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Add links, examples, or constraints if helpful.
